notes: WDF interrupt callbacks from pcidrv sample. EVT_WDF_INTERRUPT_ENABLE/DISABLE run at DIRQL (same level as ISR), not PASSIVE_LEVEL. NICEvtDeviceD0* run at PASSIVE_LEVEL during power transitions.

NICEvtInterruptEnable.label: isr
NICEvtInterruptEnable.notes: EVT_WDF_INTERRUPT_ENABLE — called at DIRQL with interrupts disabled; scanner currently misclassifies as 'other' (known false negative)

NICEvtInterruptDisable.label: isr
NICEvtInterruptDisable.notes: EVT_WDF_INTERRUPT_DISABLE — called at DIRQL with interrupts disabled; scanner currently misclassifies as 'other' (known false negative)

NICCheckForHang.label: dispatch
NICCheckForHang.notes: NDIS MiniportCheckForHangEx — called periodically by NDIS at PASSIVE or DISPATCH

NICReset.label: dispatch
NICReset.notes: NDIS MiniportResetEx — PASSIVE_LEVEL but registered as NDIS dispatch callback

NICLinkDetection.label: dispatch
NICLinkDetection.notes: Registered via NdisMSetPeriodicTimer or work item; dispatch-level context

NICEvtDeviceD0EntryPostInterruptsEnabled.label: other
NICEvtDeviceD0EntryPostInterruptsEnabled.notes: EVT_WDF_DEVICE_D0_ENTRY_POST_INTERRUPTS_ENABLED — power callback, PASSIVE_LEVEL; not a DPC/ISR/dispatch routine

NICEvtDeviceD0ExitPreInterruptsDisabled.label: other
NICEvtDeviceD0ExitPreInterruptsDisabled.notes: EVT_WDF_DEVICE_D0_EXIT_PRE_INTERRUPTS_DISABLED — power callback, PASSIVE_LEVEL; not a DPC/ISR/dispatch routine

NICStartWatchDogTimer.label: other
NICStartWatchDogTimer.notes: Helper that calls WdfTimerStart — not itself a callback; no framework role
